mapper.select: select v.*,e.actual_name createUserName from t_vehicle v left join t_employee e on e.employee_id = v.create_user_id where v.deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and v.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
SELECT * FROM t_vehicle WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and business_mode = #{businessMode} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and disabled_flag = #{disableFlag} order by vehicle_id desc
update t_vehicle set bracket_id = #{bracketId} where vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
select count(1) from t_vehicle where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
